name: double-jump
what: The autonomous double-jump improver, as a portable cartridge. Plant it in any RAPP brainstem and drive it: scan -> weakest -> jump -> submit -> loop.

plant.how: Copy agents/ + harness/ into a brainstem's AGENTS_PATH parent (the agent adds the repo root to sys.path and imports harness), or drop just the agent file in (it carries an embedded fallback). Then /chat it.
plant.warehouse: warehouse/moments.json (or it falls back to the published raw warehouse over the CDN)
